key_risks: CRITICAL: Malicious signature: Browser credential theft (P5)
HIGH: Dynamic module import with variable name (S7)
HIGH: Unexpected capability for search skill: shell (M1)

findings.title: Reads environment variable: ALGORAND_ALGOD_URL
findings.description: Code reads environment variable via os.getenv()
findings.code_snippet:
NOTE_KEY = Path('/home/molty/.openclaw/workspace/.secrets/algorand-note-key.bin')

ALGOD_TOKEN = os.getenv('ALGORAND_ALGOD_TOKEN', '')
